AI Runs in the Cloud — So Why Does Opening More Agents Lag Your Computer?

Claude's model lives in the cloud, so how can Claude Code read your project, edit files, and run commands? A beginner-friendly look at the remote-brain / local-hands split — Coding Agents, tool calls, GPU, memory, and why more Agents lag your machine.
Why You Should Understand Memory Leaks (memory leak)

"Memory" is a word that matters to every developer — how memory gets used directly affects how your program runs. This post walks through what memory leaks are, how garbage collection actually works, and three common patterns in JavaScript that quietly leak memory: forgotten event listeners, runaway timers, and closures that hold onto more than they should.
